source.name: NZC – Mathematics and Statistics Phases 1–4 (Years 0–10)
source.notes: Year-by-year teaching sequences organised into six strands: Number, Algebra, Measurement, Geometry, Statistics, Probability.

meaning.3: within 100; early regrouping; intro fractions/decimals; time basics
meaning.4: within 1000; times tables; benchmark angles/fractions; time conversions
meaning.5: multi-step; 2-digit×1-digit; fraction equivalence; decimals hundredths; unit conversions
meaning.6: advanced multi-step; decimals ops; fractions of amounts; algebraic notation
meaning.7: integers fluency; linear patterns; compound probability; data-claim evaluation

focusSummary: Build ability to investigate/classify/describe quantities, shapes, and data
Use materials/pictures to support number sense
Connect representations of number; extend addition/subtraction
Early multiplicative grouping and simple data displays
Model number operations and solve word problems
Classify/draw angles using benchmarks; tell time and convert time units
Apply number operations to measurement reasoning
Investigate patterns/variation in shapes, probabilities, and data
Extend to fractions/decimals; multi-step word problems
Benchmarks for angles; exponents; time conversions
Use number lines for integers; equations for linear patterns
Generalise and calculate unknown quantities (e.g., angles)
Operate fluently with integers; evaluate claims using data visualisations

near_miss.description: Close to correct (off-by-1/2/10, small decimal shift)

rounding_error.description: Round to wrong place or direction
patterns: round to tens instead of hundreds

fraction_misread.description: Swap numerator/denominator or treat as whole-number divide

percent_as_whole.description: Treat p% as p not p/100

time_carry_error.description: Ignore minute/hour carry or crossing hour

probability_reciprocal.description: Swap favourable and total; or use complement incorrectly

graph_reading_error.description: Read wrong bar/axis or compare incorrectly

prompt.template: What number has {t} tens and {o} ones?
What number has {h} hundreds, {t} tens and {o} ones?
Which fraction matches the shaded part?
Table: x={x1},{x2},{x3}; y={y1},{y2},{y3}. What is the rule?
Angles on a straight line sum to 180°. If one angle is {a}°, find the other.
After translating by ({dx},{dy}), where does ({x},{y}) move to?
From the bar graph, what is the value for {category}?
A claim says: '{claim}'. Based on the graph, is it supported?
A spinner has {total} equal sections; {fav} are {colour}. Probability?
